Our Clients — StackBuild < StackBuild /> Home Services Process Clients Let's Talk Home Services Process Clients Let's Talk Our Clients Trusted by Builders, Loved by Brands. From ambitious startups to established enterprises — we've helped businesses
across industries ship products that users love. TechVista NexGen Labs CloudPeak UrbanStack DataForge SwiftShip BrightEdge Innovatech TechVista NexGen Labs CloudPeak UrbanStack DataForge SwiftShip BrightEdge Innovatech Case Studies Projects We've Shipped A look at some of the impactful products we've built for our clients. SaaS Platform CloudPeak Analytics Dashboard A full-featured analytics SaaS with real-time data visualization, team collaboration, custom
reports, and Stripe-powered billing. Built with Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis. Next.js PostgreSQL Redis Stripe Mobile App SwiftShip Delivery Cross-platform delivery tracking app with real-time GPS, push notifications, and driver
management. iOS & Android. Flutter Firebase Maps API ERP System UrbanStack Inventory Custom ERP for warehouse management — inventory tracking, purchase orders, vendor management, and
automated reporting. React Node.js MongoDB Website BrightEdge Marketing High-converting marketing website with CMS, blog, lead capture forms, and A/B testing
integration. Next.js Contentful Vercel AI Chatbot Innovatech Support Bot AI-powered customer support chatbot with NLP, knowledge base integration, and seamless handoff to
human agents. Python OpenAI FastAPI SaaS Platform DataForge Project Hub Project management platform with Kanban boards, time tracking, invoicing, and client portals for
agencies. React Supabase Stripe Client Stories What Our Clients Say ★★★★★ "StackBuild took our vague idea and turned it into a polished SaaS platform
in just 8 weeks. The team's attention to detail and communication was exceptional." RP Rajesh P. CEO, CloudPeak Analytics ★★★★★ "Our delivery app needed to handle 10,000+ orders daily. StackBuild
delivered a rock-solid Flutter app that hasn't had a single critical issue in 6 months." AM Ananya M. CTO, SwiftShip ★★★★★ "They built our entire ERP system from scratch — inventory, HR, and
accounting modules. It replaced 4 different tools we were using. Incredible value." VK Vikram K. Founder, UrbanStack Want to Be Our Next Success Story? StackBuild — We Build What You Imagine < StackBuild /> Home Services Process Clients Let's Talk Home Services Process Clients Let's Talk Shipping Products Since 2024 We Build What You Imagine. From SaaS platforms to mobile apps, ERP systems to custom websites —
we turn your vision into production-ready software that scales. Start Your Project arrow_forward Explore Services south 0 + Projects Shipped 0 + Happy Clients 0 % On-Time Delivery What We Build End-to-End Tech Solutions We don't just write code. We architect, design, build, and ship complete products
that solve real business problems. language Websites & Landing Pages Stunning, responsive websites that convert. From portfolio sites to complex multi-page platforms with
CMS integration. React Next.js WordPress SEO cloud SaaS Applications Full-featured SaaS platforms with auth, billing, dashboards, analytics, multi-tenancy, and API
integrations. Full Stack Stripe Auth APIs account_tree ERP & Business Systems Custom enterprise resource planning systems — inventory, HR, accounting, CRM modules tailored to your
workflows. Enterprise Automation Reports Integrations phone_iphone Mobile Apps (iOS & Android) Native and cross-platform mobile applications. Beautiful UIs, smooth performance, and App Store /
Play Store ready. Flutter React Native iOS Android api APIs & Backend Systems Scalable REST & GraphQL APIs, microservices architecture, database design, and cloud infrastructure. Node.js Python PostgreSQL AWS psychology AI & Automation AI-powered features, chatbots, recommendation engines, workflow automation, and intelligent data
processing. OpenAI LLMs ML n8n How We Work From Idea to Launch in 4 Steps A battle-tested process that ensures we deliver on time, on budget, and beyond
expectations. 01 Discovery & Planning We dive deep into your vision. Understand your users, map out features, define the tech stack,
and create a detailed roadmap with timelines and milestones. search 02 Design & Prototyping Wireframes, high-fidelity UI/UX designs, interactive prototypes — you see and feel the product
before a single line of code is written. palette 03 Agile Development Sprint-based development with weekly demos, constant feedback loops, and transparent progress
tracking. You're in the loop every step of the way. code 04 Launch & Support Production deployment with CI/CD, monitoring, performance optimization, and ongoing maintenance.
We don't disappear after launch. rocket_launch Our Arsenal Technologies We Master React Next.js Node.js Python Flutter React Native TypeScript PostgreSQL MongoDB AWS Docker Firebase Supabase Tailwind CSS GraphQL Redis React Next.js Node.js Python Flutter React Native TypeScript PostgreSQL MongoDB AWS Docker Firebase Supabase Tailwind CSS GraphQL Redis Why StackBuild What Sets Us Apart bolt Rapid Delivery MVPs in 2–4 weeks. Full products in 2–3 months. We move fast without cutting corners. architecture Built to Scale Clean architecture, tested code, and infrastructure designed to handle growth from day one. handshake Transparent Process Weekly demos, open communication on Slack/Discord, and full access to your project repository. support_agent Post-Launch Care Bug fixes, feature additions, monitoring — we stick around to make sure your product thrives. Ecosystem Notifications Stay up to date with the latest programs, admissions, and milestones at stackeducation. Now Accepting Applications Registrations Are Officially Open! Kickstart your journey in our builder-first ecosystem. Secure your spot in the incoming batch. Registration Period MAY-30-2026 Why To Choose Stack? AI-Powered Building: Build real-world production-level applications integrated with advanced AI capabilities. Industry-Oriented Skill Development: Acquire verified technical proficiencies modeled around current enterprise requirements. Dual Project Exposure: Deploy one major and one minor comprehensive project as a benchmark of your capability. Corporate Simulation Experience: Operate in professional setups imitating standard agile sprints and direct project delivery. Networking & Community Building: Form durable connections within an exclusive community of senior mentors and peer developers. Resume & Personal Branding: Refine your professional footprints on GitHub, LinkedIn, and portfolios to stand out. Hackathons & Innovation Mindset: Cultivate competitive spirit and innovative execution through community hackathons. MSME Certification & Career Guidance: Obtain government-recognized certifications combined with dedicated career guidance paths. Scan to Register. Join the Next Generation of Builders. Secure your future with us.
